allow: Bash(mv check_all_status.py check_backend_logs.py find_quantity.py get_db_url.py get_urls.py manual_sync.py migrate_db.py read_spec.py test_db.py test_headers.py test_post_settings.py test_railway.py update_db_local.py scripts/)
